business.title: Tesla settles wrongful death lawsuit over crash that killed Florida teenager

business.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook will step down from the role, with John Ternus named his successor. Cook will continue with the company as executive chairman.

science.description: This research introduces a VSLAM framework that optimizes obstacle avoidance in indoor logistics, leveraging advanced algorithms and multi-sensor integration.

science.description: A cemetery in Ithaca, New York is the home to one of largest collections of pollinating bees that contribute the state's agriculture.

science.description: The black ghost knifefish swims without bending its body, using a single fin to move forward, backward, and hover.

science.title: Ocean eddies are amplifying climate extremes in coastal seas
science.description: Ocean eddies are churning harder, driving coastal currents and temperature extremes by warming surface waters while cooling deeper layers.

ai.title: From May 1, CBI notices to carry QR code to verify genuineness
ai.description: NEW DELHI, Apr 20 : CBI notices from May 1 will carry a special QR code, allowing people to verify their genuineness through an artificial intelligence-powered chatbot, ABHAY, a first-of-its-kind initiative by any agency to deter the public from falling prey to cybercriminals, officials said on Monday. Launching the chatbot at the 22nd D P Kohli Memorial Lecture here on Monday, Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant called it a “pivotal and opportune initiative” that would act as an […]

ai.title: A New Era at Apple: John Ternus Takes the Helm
ai.description: Apple appoints John Ternus as CEO, succeeding Tim Cook. Known for his key role in Apple's product advancements, Ternus is set to guide the tech giant through a transformative AI era, while enhancing product lines. Tim Cook transitions to executive chairman, marking a shift from supply chain to product leadership.

ai.title: Banking Titans Scramble for Anthropic's Mythos Amid Cybersecurity Concerns
ai.description: Anthropic's new AI model, Mythos, is prompting a rush among banks to gain access as regulators examine its cybersecurity risks. While some banks, like JPMorgan and Citigroup, are testing the technology, others highlight concerns over limited access. European and Asian regulators are also monitoring developments cautiously.

ai.title: DOJ Signals Antitrust Shift on Media Deals as AI Alters Industry
ai.description: Rapid changes in media fueled by increased use of artificial intelligence and streaming services require a “cautious humility” from antitrust enforcers as they assess whether mergers in the industry are threatening competition and consumers, a senior US Justice Department official said.

ai.title: Mumbai: BMC To Use AI, Advanced Tech To Detect Water Leaks, Cut 25 Per Cent Supply Loss
ai.description: BMC plans to use AI-driven tools and advanced technologies like ground penetrating radar to detect leaks in underground pipelines. The move aims to curb nearly 25% water loss and improve supply efficiency across Mumbai.
